markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, review blog ideas, and analyze performance metrics for Ambient.ai's content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New blog ideas added to Content OS, focusing on gun detection campaign across multiple topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Looker dashboard set up with Google Search Console and GA4 data to track organic search and LLM visibility performance](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Content approval process clarified: team to review and change status from "idea" to "approved" in Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Need to improve GA4 event tracking for more meaningful conversion data](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Blog Ideas

  - [Gun detection campaign spans multiple topic clusters (AI threat detection, industry-specific solutions, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [New blog ideas added to Content OS, ready for review and approval](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Team to divide and conquer blog idea reviews, focusing on different topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Prioritize articles with high-impact keywords, regardless of logical sequence](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Content Approval Process

  - [Team to review blog ideas in Content OS and change status from "idea" to "approved"](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [GrowthX team will proactively reach out if running low on approved ideas](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Aim for faster review and approval process outside of weekly meetings](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Looker Dashboard Overview

  - [Tracks organic search performance and LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Key metrics: overall sessions vs. engaged sessions, non-branded keyword performance, conversion events](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Cohort page will show performance by topic cluster once more content is published](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [Queries report shows keywords driving traffic to the website](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

### LLM Visibility and Performance

  - [ChatGPT is the largest LLM referral source, followed by Perplexity and Claude AI](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Homepage and some feature pages (e.g., Threat Detection and Response) are being cited by LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Team to work on establishing benchmarks and competitor comparisons for LLM performance](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

### Google Analytics Setup

  - [Current GA4 events are generic (e.g., Page View, Session Start)](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Need to improve event tracking for more meaningful conversion data](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - ["Demo CTA" identified as the most important lead generation event](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to review and approve blog ideas in Content OS, dividing work by topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Improve GA4 event tracking for more specific conversion data](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Establish benchmarks and competitor comparisons for LLM performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [GrowthX team to send over new blog content for review](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Continue monitoring Looker dashboard and adjust content strategy based on performance data](https://fathom.video/share/nEvLyLAZxDFsLdJUrJDX1scLmzJsA2yF?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
